TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sayie ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 70 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 67 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 74%, Tayan 16%, Amis 1%, Paywan 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sayie hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sayie hya' ga Kahaehaeoan. tay mkyahu' na Sayie hya' ga Ip'ipa'an bato. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕajie ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa kaħaeħaeoan. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa ipʔipaʔan βato. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sayie ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 27 buwan, 70 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 67 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 74%, Tayan 16%, Amis 1%, Paywan 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sayie hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sayie hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sayie hya' ga Kahaehaeoan. tay mkyahu' na Sayie hya' ga Ip'ipa'an bato. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕajie ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa kaħaeħaeoan. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕajie ħjaʔ ɣa ipʔipaʔan βato. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
